adds.rationale: Nuclear-for-AI thesis is crystallizing with the MSFT-Constellation Three Mile Island PPA; NUKZ is the cleanest pure-play ETF for the nuclear renaissance the profile names as a near-term next wave.

news_evidence.summary: Microsoft signs 20-year PPA with Constellation Energy to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 to power AI data centers - first major hyperscaler-nuclear deal of this cycle.
Range Nuclear Renaissance Index ETF (NUKZ) launched in January 2024, offering diversified exposure to utilities, SMR developers, uranium miners, and reactor-component suppliers.

adds.rationale: Intuitive Surgical is the clearest installed-base play on commercial robotics, with the new da Vinci 5 platform ramping - fits the profile's call for early exposure to robotics as a likely next wave.

news_evidence.summary: Intuitive Surgical reports Q2 2024 da Vinci procedure growth of 17% and begins phased rollout of da Vinci 5; raises full-year procedure growth guidance.
FDA clears da Vinci 5 in March 2024; Intuitive begins limited commercial launch at flagship US hospital systems.

rationale_overall: Watchlist sits at 12 of 12, so additions should be paired with removes - but no current holding has a clean fundamental-breach or peak-enthusiasm case as of Sep 30 2024 that justifies eviction. The MSFT-Constellation PPA is a material nuclear-for-AI inflection that deserves expression, and robotics is under-represented relative to the profile's stated next-wave priorities.
